analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: Supplementary Figure 16b source data not available
assumptions_made: Inspected all provided .xlsx files in data_dir; MOESM10 (Source Data) contains sheets only for Fig 1b, Fig 1f+g, Fig 3c, Fig 3f, and Fig 5a/b/d/e/g/h/i/j/l; MOESM4 contains Clinical Data; MOESM5/6/7/8 contain Supplementary Tables 1-4, none of which include the Supplementary Figure 16b (qPCR/GLI3 expression in S462TY cells treated with sonidegib) data
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Inspected all xlsx files in /data: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx (Clinical Data), MOESM5_ESM.xlsx (Supplementary Table 2), MOESM6_ESM.xlsx (Sheet1), MOESM7_ESM.xlsx (Sheet1), MOESM8_ESM.xlsx (Supplementary Table 4), and MOESM10_ESM.xlsx (Source Data).
   - MOESM10 sheet names: Fig 1b, Fig 1f+g, Fig 3c, Fig 3f, Fig 5a, Fig 5b, Fig 5d, Fig 5e, Fig 5g, Fig 5h, Fig 5i, Fig 5j, Fig 5l.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - N/A: question pertains to a qPCR in vitro experiment on S462TY cells (a cell-line-level measurement).

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Looked for any sheet containing 'Supplementary Figure 16', 'Supp Fig 16', 'S16', or GLI3/sonidegib/S462TY. None present.

D. COMPUTATION
   - Not performed because the underlying source data (Supplementary Figure 16b) is not provided in the supplied data files. The paper's source-data file (MOESM10) covers only the main-text Figures 1, 3, and 5. Other MOESM files contain supplementary tables and clinical data but not supplementary figure source data.

E. RESULT
   - DATA_UNAVAILABLE.

F. CAVEATS
   - Per blinding contract, the paper PDF was not consulted. The authors' supplementary figures may only be available as rendered images in the PDF/HTML supplement and not as raw data in the Source Data file.
